title: ribesiodes angustifolium
intro: Rabies is not mentioned. Ribesiodes angustifolium, also known as the Canadian buffaloberry or Mountain buffaloberry, is a plant species that belongs to the family Grossulariaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ribesiodes angustifolium include potential antioxidant and immunomodulatory activities, and it is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures.
